speaker: GONERIL
text: Welcome, my lord. I marvel our mild husband

speaker: GONERIL
text: Not met us on the way.

speaker: GONERIL
text: Now, where’s your master?

speaker: OSWALD
text: Madam, within, but never man so changed.

speaker: OSWALD
text: I told him of the army that was landed;

speaker: OSWALD
text: He smiled at it. I told him you were coming;

speaker: OSWALD
text: His answer was “The worse.” Of Gloucester’s treachery

speaker: OSWALD
text: And of the loyal service of his son

speaker: OSWALD
text: When I informed him, then he called me “sot”

speaker: OSWALD
text: And told me I had turned the wrong side out.

speaker: OSWALD
text: What most he should dislike seems pleasant to him;

speaker: OSWALD
text: What like, offensive.

speaker: GONERIL
text: Then shall you go no further.

speaker: GONERIL
text: It is the cowish terror of his spirit,

speaker: GONERIL
text: That dares not undertake. He’ll not feel wrongs

speaker: GONERIL
text: Which tie him to an answer. Our wishes on the way

speaker: GONERIL
text: May prove effects. Back, Edmund, to my brother.

speaker: GONERIL
text: Hasten his musters and conduct his powers.

speaker: GONERIL
text: I must change names at home and give the distaff

speaker: GONERIL
text: Into my husband’s hands. This trusty servant

speaker: GONERIL
text: Shall pass between us. Ere long you are like to hear—

speaker: GONERIL
text: If you dare venture in your own behalf—

speaker: GONERIL
text: A mistress’s command. Wear this; spare speech.

speaker: GONERIL
text:
Decline your head.
                 
                She
                 
                kisses
                 
                him
                .
               This kiss, if it durst speak,

speaker: GONERIL
text: Would stretch thy spirits up into the air.

speaker: GONERIL
text: Conceive, and fare thee well.

speaker: EDMUND
text: Yours in the ranks of death.

speaker: GONERIL
text: My most dear Gloucester!

speaker: GONERIL
text: O, the difference of man and man!

speaker: GONERIL
text: To thee a woman’s services are due;

speaker: GONERIL
text: My fool usurps my body.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Madam, here comes my lord.

speaker: GONERIL
text: I have been worth the whistle.

speaker: ALBANY
text: O Goneril,

speaker: ALBANY
text: You are not worth the dust which the rude wind

speaker: ALBANY
text: Blows in your face. I fear your disposition.

speaker: ALBANY
text: That nature which contemns its origin

speaker: ALBANY
text: Cannot be bordered certain in itself.

speaker: ALBANY
text: She that herself will sliver and disbranch

speaker: ALBANY
text: From her material sap perforce must wither

speaker: ALBANY
text: And come to deadly use.

speaker: GONERIL
text: No more. The text is foolish.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Wisdom and goodness to the vile seem vile.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Filths savor but themselves. What have you done?

speaker: ALBANY
text: Tigers, not daughters, what have you performed?

speaker: ALBANY
text: A father, and a gracious agèd man,

speaker: ALBANY
text: Whose reverence even the head-lugged bear would lick,

speaker: ALBANY
text: Most barbarous, most degenerate, have you madded.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Could my good brother suffer you to do it?

speaker: ALBANY
text: A man, a prince, by him so benefited!

speaker: ALBANY
text: If that the heavens do not their visible spirits

speaker: ALBANY
text: Send quickly down to tame these vile offenses,

speaker: ALBANY
text: It will come:

speaker: ALBANY
text: Humanity must perforce prey on itself,

speaker: ALBANY
text: Like monsters of the deep.

speaker: GONERIL
text: Milk-livered man,

speaker: GONERIL
text: That bear’st a cheek for blows, a head for wrongs;

speaker: GONERIL
text: Who hast not in thy brows an eye discerning

speaker: GONERIL
text: Thine honor from thy suffering; that not know’st

speaker: GONERIL
text: Fools do those villains pity who are punished

speaker: GONERIL
text: Ere they have done their mischief. Where’s thy drum?

speaker: GONERIL
text: France spreads his banners in our noiseless land,

speaker: GONERIL
text: With plumèd helm thy state begins to threat,

speaker: GONERIL
text: Whilst thou, a moral fool, sits still and cries

speaker: GONERIL
text: “Alack, why does he so?”

speaker: ALBANY
text: See thyself, devil!

speaker: ALBANY
text: Proper deformity shows not in the fiend

speaker: ALBANY
text: So horrid as in woman.

speaker: GONERIL
text: O vain fool!

speaker: ALBANY
text: Thou changèd and self-covered thing, for shame

speaker: ALBANY
text: Bemonster not thy feature. Were ’t my fitness

speaker: ALBANY
text: To let these hands obey my blood,

speaker: ALBANY
text: They are apt enough to dislocate and tear

speaker: ALBANY
text: Thy flesh and bones. Howe’er thou art a fiend,

speaker: ALBANY
text: A woman’s shape doth shield thee.

speaker: GONERIL
text: Marry, your manhood, mew—

speaker: ALBANY
text: What news?

speaker: MESSENGER
text: O, my good lord, the Duke of Cornwall’s dead,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Slain by his servant, going to put out

speaker: MESSENGER
text: The other eye of Gloucester.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Gloucester’s eyes?

speaker: MESSENGER
text: A servant that he bred, thrilled with remorse,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Opposed against the act, bending his sword

speaker: MESSENGER
text: To his great master, who, thereat enraged,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Flew on him and amongst them felled him dead,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: But not without that harmful stroke which since

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Hath plucked him after.

speaker: ALBANY
text: This shows you are above,

speaker: ALBANY
text: You justicers, that these our nether crimes

speaker: ALBANY
text: So speedily can venge. But, O poor Gloucester,

speaker: ALBANY
text: Lost he his other eye?

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Both, both, my lord.—

speaker: MESSENGER
text: This letter, madam, craves a speedy answer.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: ’Tis from your sister.

speaker: GONERIL
text: One way I like this well.

speaker: GONERIL
text: But being widow and my Gloucester with her

speaker: GONERIL
text: May all the building in my fancy pluck

speaker: GONERIL
text: Upon my hateful life. Another way

speaker: GONERIL
text: The news is not so tart.—I’ll read, and answer.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Where was his son when they did take his eyes?

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Come with my lady hither.

speaker: ALBANY
text: He is not here.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: No, my good lord. I met him back again.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Knows he the wickedness?

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Ay, my good lord. ’Twas he informed against him

speaker: MESSENGER
text: And quit the house on purpose, that their punishment

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Might have the freer course.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Gloucester, I live

speaker: ALBANY
text: To thank thee for the love thou show’d’st the King,

speaker: ALBANY
text: And to revenge thine eyes.—Come hither, friend.

speaker: ALBANY
text: Tell me what more thou know’st.
